name: Task body evidence log standard

taskBodyContract.legacySourceOriginalPropertyRole: compatibility only; not authoritative for new evidence events
taskBodyContract.lineSourceOriginalRule: copy the project-local LINE conversation master block into the matching record without summarizing or rewriting
taskBodyContract.lineImageRule: embed the image directly as stored by the LINE conversation master
taskBodyContract.lineDocumentRule: preserve the file name and attachment link; do not expand document contents

definitionOfDone: Shared task body evidence log standard exists in AMCore docs
Reusable AMCore migration tool exists for project-local task body conversion
Project-local task creation writes the standard body format
Project-local status updates append evidence records
LINE source original blocks preserve the LINE conversation master format
Image messages are embedded inside the matching source original record
Document/file messages preserve file names and links
Project manifests and upgrade records are updated separately
